# XAGI Linear Issue Template

Use this for issues created directly in Linear (or when mirroring from GitHub) so both systems stay consistent.

## Title
`type(scope): concise summary`

Examples:
- `bug(nav): mobile menu closes immediately`
- `feat(blog): add tag-based search`

## Description

### Summary
One-line description of the issue/request.

### Context / Why
Who is affected and why this matters.

### Current behavior (for bugs)
What happens now.

### Expected behavior
What should happen.

### Reproduction steps (for bugs)
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

### Proposed solution (for features)
Describe implementation direction and constraints.

### Scope
Routes/components/scripts/files impacted.

### Priority / Severity
Choose one:
- P0 / Critical
- P1 / High
- P2 / Medium
- P3 / Low

### Acceptance criteria
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

### Links
- GitHub issue: `https://github.com/<org>/<repo>/issues/<id>`
- PR (if any):
- Related docs/designs:

### Evidence
Logs, screenshots, stack traces, metrics.
